name: Travis Witt
abilities: ★ The Shadow — the man the field never quite knows. A dropped meme, a one-line jab, then silence; he slips in from the treeline, plays lights-out, and is gone before you catch his name.
Silent and Deadly. Net finishes 4th → 7th → 2nd, pairs runner-up twice, and a match-play closer — 4 & 3 over Korey. "Close to lights out for twenty-four holes."
flavor: “Figured there'd be some golf fans and degenerate gamblers in the group.”
caption: Travis Witt · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
